programme.title: Instant Family
programme.desc: When Pete and Ellie decide to start a family, they stumble into the world of foster care adoption. They hope to take in one small child, but when they meet three siblings, including a rebellious 15-year-old girl, they find themselves speeding from zero to three kids overnight. Now, Pete and Ellie must try to learn the ropes of instant parenthood in the hope of becoming a family.

programme.title: How to Lose a Guy in 10 Days
programme.desc: Andie Anderson writes an advice column for a fashionable magazine and agrees to demonstrate how easy it is to attract then alienate a man in just ten days. She chooses Benjamin Barry, little knowing hes an advertising executive whose job rests on proving he understands women so well that he can make one fall for him in two weeks.

programme.title: The Hangover
programme.desc: A crazy Las Vegas bachelor party turns into a race against time when three hung-over groomsmen awaken after a night of drunken debauchery to find that the groom has gone missing, and attempt to get him to the alter in time for his wedding.

programme.title: The Hangover Part II
programme.desc: A group of friends go to Thailand for a quiet and restrained stag party, but are dismayed to wake up in a mysterious hotel room, with a man missing and no memory of the night before. Of course, Alan manages to get himself in with the crowd.

programme.title: The Hangover Part III
programme.desc: Phil, Stu and Doug take Alan on a road trip to help him through a personal crisis.

programme.title: Jackass: The Movie
programme.desc: Johnny Knoxville and his mad companions leap onto the big screen. Expect the usual mad gross-out japes, from making snow cones out of urine to using the display toilets in bathroom outlets, and from racing golf carts over hallowed greens to tightrope walking over alligators.

programme.title: Jackass 3
programme.desc: Johnny Knoxville and the gang unleash their most insane stunts yet, from roller-skating with a buffalo herd, to playing tennis with a beehive.

programme.title: Am I OK?
programme.desc: When Lucy realises that shes never been attracted to men, her lifelong friend Jane helps her navigate coming out in her 30s.

programme.title: Hope Springs
programme.desc: A woman drags her skeptical husband to a renowned counsellors marriage retreat to try to put the spark back in their relationship.

programme.title: Mean Girls
programme.desc: After 15 years in African bush country, Cady knows all about herd instincts, but nothing has prepared her for high school. She joins a popular but cruelly manipulative crowd of girls known as the `Plastics and secretly mocks them, but the fun stops when one betrays her and steals the boy she fancies.

programme.title: Instant Family
programme.desc: When Pete and Ellie decide to start a family, they stumble into the world of foster care adoption. They hope to take in one small child, but when they meet three siblings, including a rebellious 15-year-old girl, they find themselves speeding from zero to three kids overnight. Now, Pete and Ellie must try to learn the ropes of instant parenthood in the hope of becoming a family.

programme.title: The 40-Year-Old Virgin
programme.desc: Electronics store stock boy Andy Stitzer is horrified when he is found out as a virgin by his workmates - just when he thought he was becoming one of the gang. David, Jay and Cal surprise him by making it their mission to get him a girl and help him lose his virginity.

programme.title: Miss Congeniality
programme.desc: An uncouth FBI agent goes undercover in the Miss United States beauty pageant as a contestant to flush out a terrorist who plans to bomb the event. The hard-nosed cop, who prides herself on her toughness, must discard her trainers and feminise her behaviour if she is to avoid blowing her cover.

programme.title: Miss Congeniality 2: Armed and Fabulous
programme.desc: FBI agent Gracie is given another makeover to become the face of the Bureau, prior to embarking on a promotional tour. When two of her friends are kidnapped - Miss USA and a beauty pageant director - she decides to investigate on her own, in defiance of orders to the contrary.

programme.title: Role Models
programme.desc: Danny is sour after driving away his girlfriend, and Wheeler is into anything wearing a skirt. The two get into a fight with a trucker and choose community service over a jail term.

programme.title: Ace Ventura: Pet Detective
programme.desc: Tale about an unconventional sleuths attempts to find a football teams stolen mascot dolphin. The Miami Dolphins are aghast when their beloved Snowflake is abducted one week before the all-important Super Bowl, so they call in Ace Ventura, a private eye who uses unorthodox methods to retrieve missing animals.

programme.title: Ace Ventura: When Nature Calls
programme.desc: Sequel about the zany private detective who specialises in locating missing pets. Ace Ventura travels to Africa to search for a kidnapped sacred albino bat, which reputedly has the power to restore peace between two warring tribes.

programme.title: American Pie
programme.desc: Believing it essential before they go to college, four teenage boys vow to lose their virginity and enter into a pact, each attempting to be the first to do the deed as their efforts are met with varying levels of success and failure.

programme.title: Two Weeks Notice
programme.desc: An ambitious law graduate decides to leave her job as she feels her skills are not appreciated by her boss, who basically treats her like his PA. However, he wont let her go that easily.

programme.title: White Chicks
programme.desc: Disgraced FBI agents Marcus and Kevin go to bizarre lengths to catch a devious millionaire. They disguise themselves as dumb white socialites Brittany and Tiffany Wilson, the heiresses to a hotel fortune who are under threat. Gross-out comedic farce from the makers of `Scary Movie.

programme.title: The Brutalist
programme.desc: Escaping postwar Europe, a visionary architect comes to America to rebuild his life, his career, and his marriage. On his own in a strange new country, he settles in Pennsylvania, where a wealthy and prominent industrialist recognises his talent.

programme.title: Amadeus
programme.desc: Once the highly regarded composer to the Viennese Court, Salieri is now an old man, unknown and confined to an asylum. After a suicide attempt he recounts his story to a young cleric, going back 30 years to his heyday at the court of Emperor Joseph II, where he first met the young Mozart. Despite Salieris Machiavellian attempts to frustrate Mozarts progress, the great young composer attracts the favour of the Emperor.

programme.title: Two Mules for Sister Sara
programme.desc: Whimsical but engaging western about a drifter who saves a woman from a gang of marauders. The cowboy is astonished to learn that the woman is a nun, especially when he witnesses her heavy drinking and cigar-smoking ways. The unlikely pair embark on a voyage of discovery as they become embroiled in the Mexican War.

programme.title: Quartet
programme.desc: A long-smouldering flame is rekindled when a once-popular opera star reunites with her ex-husband and fellow performers at a retirement home for musicians.

programme.title: Legends of the Fall
programme.desc: Sweeping epic about three sons raised on a Montana ranch by their father, a colonel who has turned his back on the army after the Indian Wars. Though the destinies of the boys are very different, two forces impact on each of their lives: the Great War in Europe and the love of a young woman. Covering several decades, the action ranges from majestic Montana to the battlefields of Europe and adventure on the high seas.

programme.title: Dunkirk
programme.desc: Germany advances into France, trapping Allied troops on the beaches of Dunkirk. Under air and ground cover from British and French forces, troops are slowly and methodically evacuated from the beach using every vessel that can be found.

programme.title: Darkest Hour
programme.desc: With the German Army now just across the Channel, newly-appointed Prime Minister Winston Churchill must decide between negotiating a peace treaty with Hitler or standing firm. With the King, the public and his own political party all questioning his wisdom, the hard-drinking Churchill has to survive his own darkest hour and rally the country behind him.

programme.title: Elizabeth: The Golden Age
programme.desc: Elizabeth might have her royal rival Mary Queen of Scots in custody, but a far greater threat lies to the east: the Spanish Armada. Despite her reign of 30 years, Elizabeths hold on the English throne remains uncertain. Her kingdom lies in the shadow of mighty Spain, Philip IIs vast army and the Inquisition, but Elizabeth is undaunted.

programme.title: Terms of Endearment
programme.desc: While widow Aurora fends off a stream of admirers, daughter Emma learns the hard facts of married life.

programme.title: It Ends With Us
programme.desc: Lily Bloom falls for a charming neurosurgeon after she moves to Boston to chase her dream of opening her own business. However, when her first love suddenly reenters her life, her relationship gets upended, leaving her with an impossible choice.

programme.title: The Cut
programme.desc: Given one last shot at glory, a former boxing champion has just six days to make weight for a title fight. His obsession soon leaves him at the mercy of a notorious trainer who takes every last ounce from his mind, body and soul.

programme.title: Joker: Folie à Deux
programme.desc: Struggling with his dual identity, failed comedian Arthur Fleck stumbles upon true love while incarcerated at Arkham State Hospital. Awaiting trial for the murder of five people, Fleck soon discovers the music thats always been inside him.

programme.title: Valentines Day
programme.desc: Following a group of Los Angeles residents who try to find their way through the highs and lows of love during a single day.

programme.title: Valentines Day
programme.desc: Following a group of Los Angeles residents who try to find their way through the highs and lows of love during a single day.

programme.title: The Hobbit: The Desolation of Smaug
The Hobbit: The Battle of the Five Armies
programme.desc: After the dwarves find and awaken Smaug the dragon, a battle arises to gain control of Erebor and the vast treasure inside. Meanwhile, Bilbo Baggins is in possession of a mysterious and magical ring.

programme.title: The Hobbit: An Unexpected Journey
programme.desc: At the urging of the wizard Gandalf, unassuming hobbit Bilbo Baggins joins 13 dwarves on a perilous quest to reclaim the kingdom of Erebor and gains possession of the powerful One Ring.

programme.title: The Hobbit: The Desolation of Smaug
The Hobbit: The Desolation of Smaug
Fatal Attraction
programme.desc: A glamorous career woman loses control when her married lover, a Manhattan attorney, ends their brief affair. Unable to accept his rejection, she pursues him at the office, and then at his home, eventually drawing his wife and daughter into the confrontation.

programme.title: Escape From Alcatraz
programme.desc: Fact-based story set in Americas former maximum-security prison, from which escape was supposed to be impossible. For habitual jailbreaker Frank Morris, however, Alcatraz is just another set of bars and walls that will never hold him.

programme.title: Demolition Man
programme.desc: Violence has been outlawed in the politically correct regime of 2032, and the only weapons in existence are consigned to a museum, but when an escaped psychopath heads straight for the museum, the authorities decide the only effective recourse they have is to thaw out a violent, cryogenically frozen cop.

programme.title: The Warriors
programme.desc: Wrongly accused of assassinating top gang leader Cyrus at a rally, Coney Islanders The Warriors have to fight their way home over the course of one long, violent night.

programme.title: Shenandoah
programme.desc: A mans neutrality during the American Civil War is tested by his daughters marriage and his sons capture by Union forces.

programme.title: Enter the Dragon
programme.desc: A kung fu expert is assigned to penetrate an island fortress to destroy an opium and white slavery empire.

programme.title: Batman Forever
programme.desc: DA Harvey Dent and vengeful scientist The Riddler plan to take down Batman, as Dent wrongly believes that it is Batmans fault he was disfigured, and the scientist is angry with Bruce Wayne for rejecting his experiments. The Gotham City superhero is going to need his new partner, boy wonder Robin, but will he be able to cope with the distraction of sexy doctor Chase Meridian?

programme.title: Batman and Robin
programme.desc: Batman battles super-villain Mr Freeze and seductive eco-terrorist Poison Ivy. With Freeze planning a permanent winter, faithful butler Alfred falling to a mysterious illness, and Ivy coming between the caped crusader and Robin, teaming up with Batgirl is the crime-fighting duos only chance of saving the day.

programme.title: Jaws
programme.desc: Scary chiller about a coastal community plagued by a killer shark. With the summer tourist season at hand, the mayor is keen to keep the first attack hushed up. However, when an expert claims that the attacks are the work of a giant great white shark, there is only one solution - to kill the monster fish before it can feed again.

programme.title: Jaws 2
programme.desc: Another great white shark arrives to terrorise the holiday resort of Amity Island. Having recovered from the grisly events of four years ago, the island is once again packed with tourists. Families are sailing in the bay and swimming off the beach, but when two divers and a water-skier go missing, the local police chief fears that he is about to relive his greatest nightmare.

programme.title: Jaws III
programme.desc: Second sequel to Steven Spielbergs 1970s blockbuster transports the action from Amity Island to a new undersea kingdom attraction in a Florida theme park. The capture of a baby great white shark is big news and brings crowds to the park - until its mother arrives on the scene.

programme.title: Pulp Fiction
programme.desc: A hit man falls for his bosss wife when he is asked to escort her on a date, a boxer reneges on his promise to throw a big fight, and a couple attempt a heist that rapidly escalates out of control.

programme.title: Enter the Dragon
programme.desc: A kung fu expert is assigned to penetrate an island fortress to destroy an opium and white slavery empire.

programme.title: Enter the Dragon

programme.title: Ghostbusters II
programme.desc: The phantom-fighters return to the streets of New York when they come to the aid of a woman who fears that her baby is the target of ghostly forces. Four years after Dr Peter Venkman broke up with Dana Barrett, she appeals for help to save her son when an arch-demon trapped in an oil painting wants to take over his body. The old team reunite and trace the source of the trouble to a sinister underground river of slime.

programme.title: Sky Cinema Preview
programme.desc: Previews of the great films now playing on Sky Cinema plus other highlights showing on Sky.

programme.title: Ghostbusters
programme.desc: Armed with proton packs and plenty of attitude, four women prepare for an epic battle as mischievous ghosts start to wreak havoc in New York.

programme.desc: Supernatural comedy about three New York parapsychology professors who decide to set up a ghost-catching agency. Soon a storm of malevolent spirits threatens to destroy the city, and the mysterious contents of a womans fridge suggest a paranormal Armageddon.

programme.title: Bone Lake
programme.desc: Forced to share a mansion with a mysterious and attractive couple, Diego and Sages dream getaway soon spirals into a nightmarish maze of sex, lies and manipulation as terrifying secrets come to light, triggering a bloody battle for survival.

programme.title: Reckless
programme.desc: A former convict on parole must outwit the police to get his share of an old heist.

programme.title: King Ivory
programme.desc: Based upon extensive research with law enforcement, gangs, inmates, migrants, and addicts, an expose on fentanyl trafficking, and its effect on all walks of life.

programme.title: One More Shot
programme.desc: On New Years Eve 1999, Minnie discovers a bottle of tequila that allows her to travel through time, each shot taking her back to the start of the night, giving her the chance to alter the course of her millennium.

programme.title: Plainclothes
programme.desc: In the 1990s, an undercover officer is told to entrap and apprehend gay men only to find himself drawn to one of his targets.

programme.title: Jurassic World Rebirth
programme.desc: Skilled operatives travel to an island research facility to secure life-saving DNA from dinosaurs. As the top-secret mission becomes more and more dangerous, they soon make a sinister, shocking discovery thats been hidden from the world for decades.

programme.desc: When five friends cause a deadly car accident, they cover up their involvement and keep it a secret rather than face the consequences. One year later, they find themselves stalked by a mysterious killer who knows what they did last summer.

programme.title: How to Train Your Dragon
programme.desc: On the isle of Berk, a Viking boy named Hiccup defies tradition by befriending a dragon named Toothless. However, when an ancient threat emerges that endangers both species, Hiccups friendship with Toothless becomes the key to forging a new future.

programme.channel: Sky Cinema Sci Fi and Horror HD.uk
programme.title: The Watched
programme.desc: A 28-year-old artist gets stranded in an expansive, untouched forest in western Ireland. Finding shelter, she unknowingly becomes trapped alongside three strangers who are stalked by mysterious creatures every night.

programme.channel: Sky Cinema Sci Fi and Horror HD.uk
programme.title: Beast of War
programme.desc: During World War II, a Japanese fighter sinks an Australian warship in the Timor Sea. Clinging to a makeshift raft, a handful of soldiers soon find themselves in a desperate fight for survival as a great white shark circles in the water.

programme.channel: Sky Cinema Sci Fi and Horror HD.uk
programme.title: Zombie Town
programme.desc: Two teens uncover a centuries-old secret when they decide to watch a zombie movie on Halloween night. However, when the townspeople themselves turn into the undead, they must track down an infamous filmmaker and break the curse before its too late.

programme.channel: Sky Cinema Sci Fi and Horror HD.uk
programme.title: Terminator Salvation
programme.desc: After the triumph of the machines on Judgement Day and with killer robots hunting down the last vestiges of humanity, resistance fighter John Connor battles back. However, the arrival of a mysterious stranger threatens to tip the balance in favour of the machines.

programme.channel: Sky Cinema Sci Fi and Horror HD.uk
programme.title: Us
programme.desc: Accompanied by her husband, son and daughter, Adelaide Wilson returns to the beachfront home where she grew up as a child. Haunted by a traumatic experience from the past, Adelaide grows increasingly concerned that something bad is going to happen. Her worst fears soon become a reality when four masked strangers descend upon the house, forcing the Wilsons into a fight for survival. When the masks come off, the family is horrified to learn that each attacker takes the appearance of one of them.

programme.channel: Sky Cinema Sci Fi and Horror HD.uk
programme.title: The Lawnmower Man
programme.desc: Visually arresting thriller about a researcher who uses a mentally disabled gardener for ill-advised experiments in inducing mental development through virtual reality simulations. At first, the simulations seem to enhance the lawnmower mans mental powers, but then the experiment goes haywire. Based on a short story by Stephen King.

programme.channel: Sky Cinema Sci Fi and Horror HD.uk
programme.title: Live Die Repeat: Edge of Tomorrow
programme.desc: A soldier who was killed in action gets caught up in a time loop, in which he repeatedly relives his last battle. However, the more times he fights, the closer he gets to discovering how to defeat the alien enemy.

programme.channel: Sky Cinema Sci Fi and Horror HD.uk
programme.title: Get Out
programme.desc: A young photographer uncovers a dark secret when he meets his girlfriends seemingly friendly parents for the first time at their posh estate.

programme.channel: Sky Cinema Sci Fi and Horror HD.uk

programme.channel: Sky Cinema Sci Fi and Horror HD.uk
programme.title: Companion
programme.desc: A weekend getaway turns bloody and violent when a subservient android thats built for human companionship goes haywire.

programme.channel: Sky Cinema Sci Fi and Horror HD.uk
programme.title: 28 Days Later
programme.desc: A small group of survivors try to stay a step ahead of the vicious, virus-infected humans that have overrun London.

programme.channel: Sky Cinema Sci Fi and Horror HD.uk
programme.title: Blade
programme.desc: A half-human, half-vampire superhero hunts down the brutal bloodsucking creature who infected his mother.

programme.channel: Sky Cinema Sci Fi and Horror HD.uk
programme.title: Dual
programme.desc: Upon receiving a terminal diagnosis, Sarah opts for a cloning procedure to ease her loss on her friends and family. When she makes a miraculous recovery, her attempts to decommission her clone fail, leading to a court-mandated duel to the death.

programme.channel: Sky Cinema Sci Fi and Horror HD.uk
programme.title: Dual
programme.desc: Upon receiving a terminal diagnosis, Sarah opts for a cloning procedure to ease her loss on her friends and family. When she makes a miraculous recovery, her attempts to decommission her clone fail, leading to a court-mandated duel to the death.

programme.title: The Lost Boys
programme.desc: Fang-in-cheek tale about a single-parent family who move to the coastal town of Santa Clara where the local juvenile delinquents are actually a pack of vampires.

programme.title: Wolf Man
programme.desc: Attacked by an unseen animal, Blake and his family barricade themselves inside a farmhouse as the creature prowls the perimeter. As the night stretches on, however, he begins to behave strangely, transforming into something unrecognizable.

programme.title: Pitch Black
programme.desc: A deep space transporter crash-lands on a desolate planet circled by three suns. Among the survivors are pilot Carolyn Fry, mystic Abu `Imam al-Walid, cop William J Johns and convicted criminal Richard B Riddick, and their first thoughts are of survival and escape. Then Fry finds out that the planet suffers a total eclipse every 22 years, which is when the hibernating, flesh-eating inhabitants awake and hunt.

programme.title: The Crazies
programme.desc: David Dutton is the sheriff of picture-perfect American town Ogden Marsh. One night and out of the blue one of its citizens shows up during a baseball game with a shot-gun and ready to kill. This is the beginning of a spiral of violence and mayhem.

programme.title: Until Dawn
programme.desc: Exploring an abandoned visitor centre, Clover and her friends encounter a masked killer who murders them one by one. However, when they mysteriously wake up at the beginning of the same night, theyre forced to relive the terror over and over again.

programme.title: Speak No Evil
programme.desc: A dream holiday turns into a living nightmare when an American couple and their daughter spend the weekend at a British familys idyllic country estate.

programme.title: Psycho
programme.desc: Classic chiller about the grisly goings-on in a remote motel run by a timid and decidedly odd young man and his domineering mother. The film totally changed Hollywoods perception of the horror genre and broke many of the movie industrys taboos.

programme.title: Sinners
programme.desc: Trying to leave their troubled lives behind, twin brothers return to their Mississippi hometown to start again, only to discover that an even greater evil is waiting to welcome them back.

programme.title: IT
programme.desc: Seven young outcasts in Derry, Maine, are about to face their worst nightmare -- an ancient, shape-shifting evil that emerges from the sewer every 27 years to prey on the towns children. Banding together over the course of one horrifying summer, the friends must overcome their own personal fears to battle the murderous, bloodthirsty clown known as Pennywise.

programme.title: The Shining
programme.desc: Frustrated writer Jack Torrance takes a job as the winter caretaker at the ominous, mountain-locked Overlook Hotel so that he can write in peace. When he arrives there with his wife and son, they learn that the previous caretaker had gone mad. Slowly Jack becomes possessed by the evil, demonic presence in the hotel.

programme.title: The Exorcist
programme.desc: A famous actress calls upon medical science for help when her daughter begins behaving strangely, but without any success. Then, as bizarre and horrific incidents involving the daughter increase, her mother turns in desperation to the Church, and to a priest who doubts his own faith.

programme.title: Heart Eyes
programme.desc: A masked maniac with glowing, red eyes returns every Valentines Day to slaughter unsuspecting couples. When a cynical ad executive and her hopelessly romantic colleague become the next target, they decide to fight back and end the reign of terror.

programme.title: From Dusk Till Dawn
programme.desc: A kidnapped family and their two murderous captors confront bloodthirsty demons after crossing the Mexican border.

programme.title: From Dusk Till Dawn
programme.desc: A kidnapped family and their two murderous captors confront bloodthirsty demons after crossing the Mexican border.

programme.title: The Godfather, Part II
programme.desc: Vito struggles to make a living, legally or illegally, for his wife and family in 1910s Little Italy, while Michael Corleones 1950s business expansion and lust for power leads to paranoia and the destruction of his family.

programme.title: Amongst the Wolves
programme.desc: Danny, an ex-soldier homeless in Dublin, meets Will, a teen fleeing a drug gang. Their encounter forces them to confront their pasts while navigating the harsh realities they face.

programme.title: The Surfer
programme.desc: A man revisits his childhood beach to surf with his son. Humiliated by locals, he becomes entangled in an escalating conflict that pushes him to his limits.

programme.title: Layer Cake

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: The revered head of the Ferengi business empire pays a visit to DS9, making a nervous Quark suspicious of his leaders sudden interest.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Daniel Jacksons reunion with Share leads to painful consequences.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Janeway and Seven of Nine seek to undermine the Borg queens authority when a dream fantasy spawned by the drones threatens the Collective.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Picard and Data return from a short mission to find the ships crew degenerating into primitive creatures.

programme.title: Primeval
programme.desc: When a young girl chases her dog through an anomaly she finds herself trapped in a dangerous new world of deserts and twinkling stars. Her amazement quickly turns to panic when something inside the sand rises up - giant Silurian scorpions! Cutter and Stephen set out to rescue her but when the anomaly closes, all three of them get marooned on the other side. Will they ever be able to find their way home?

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: After finding a group of teens dead from a drug overdose, the team races to find the dangerous dealer and his supplier; OA questions where he stands in his faith.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: When a prominent doctor is found dead in a ritualistic slaying, the team must race against time to hunt down a religiously motivated serial killer; Scola faces a life-or-death decision.

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: After the massacre in Nicks loft, Captain Renard is determined to eliminate him once and for all. Monroe and Rosalee struggle over whether to stay in Portland, and Eve suffers side effects from the sticks healing power.

programme.title: Warrior
programme.desc: Ah Sahm and Young Jun transport precious cargo through the Sierra Nevada, and are forced to spend the night with three strangers.

programme.title: Cop Squad
programme.desc: A documentary that reveals what life on the beat is really like.

programme.title: Brit Cops: War on Crime
programme.desc: Action-packed documentary series following Britains cops in their war on crime.

programme.title: Highway Patrol
programme.desc: A driver is caught using his phone while on the road and launches into a profanity-laden rant. Also, Sergeant Ash Hodges comes across a man in a beaten up car whos leaving a crash scene.

programme.title: Impossible Animals
programme.desc: Patrick Ayree examines the rainforest residents that have pushed their bodies to the limit, revealing some of the worlds most remarkable behaviours and adaptations.

programme.title: Great Parks of Africa
programme.desc: The Addo Elephant Park was founded in 1931 and is 1,640km2. It hosts more than 450 elephants and other mammals and was created in response to the elephant population falling as low as eleven.

programme.title: Great Parks of Africa
programme.desc: Table Mountain National Park on the southwestern tip of Africa surrounded by ocean and humanity. It is a rugged peninsula jutting out into the cold Atlantic Ocean and forming an island of incredible diversity.

programme.title: Planet Weird
programme.desc: Discover how weirdness is baked into some animals DNA from birth. Check out the bowerbirds mate-attracting dance moves, the Christmas Island crabs traffic-dodging prowess, and the sockeye salmons uphill swimming skills.

programme.title: Planet Weird
programme.desc: A look at the abilities that give some animals an edge in life, including fireflies flashes, the tarsiers night vision, the mantis shrimps knockout punch, and the saltwater crocs prey-detecting pressure sensors.

programme.title: Planet Weird
programme.desc: Meeting natures most wanted to see why some species dont get the respect they deserve, including the great white sharks electrical sensors, the razor-sharp limbs of the dead leaf mantis, and the zombie-creating powers of cordyceps fungi.

programme.title: Wild Birds of Australia
programme.desc: Follow the story of Harry and Sally, a pair of little penguins. These flightless, flippered birds create some of the noisiest neighbourhoods in nature.

programme.title: Wild Birds of Australia
programme.desc: The Emu is Australias biggest native bird and is the second largest bird in the world after the African ostrich, two metres tall, with an almost three metre running stride and totally flightless.

programme.title: Africas Wild Roommates -- How Animals Share Bed and Board
programme.desc: An exploration of the joys and sorrows of living together, following a range of different animals in Africa that live together in communities.

programme.title: 13 Hours to Survive
programme.desc: Descend into the tide pool, where a hermit crab house hunts, a baby catshark runs into strange neighbours, and an octopus terrorises prey. Watch seagulls and other creatures hunt on the surface as the heat rises and oxygen depletes in the pool.

programme.title: 13 Hours to Survive
programme.desc: Count down the seconds as the sun sets and predators prowl around the pool before the tide finally rolls in. Persevere as night falls with a kleptomaniacal slug and an acrobatic scallop, while a pair of sneaky crabs take a dangerous shot at romance.

programme.title: Wild Battleground
programme.desc: Discover how different animals use the terrain to their advantage and their unique attributes to defeat their opponents at each location, becoming masters of communication, camouflage, diplomacy and combat.

programme.title: Untamed Valley
programme.desc: Bustling with wildlife, a grassland lies at the heart of Zambias Luangwa Valley known to locals as the Ebony Plain. Its a busy little neighbourhood and home to a family of warthogs, baboons and a solitary female leopard named Olimba.

programme.title: My Best Friends An Animal
programme.desc: Exploring the stories behind remarkable friendships that have formed between humans and some of the most unlikely animal companions, from a bull that plays football to a mouse family living in an English garden.

programme.title: Extraordinary Animals
programme.desc: Playful: The animals of Australia work hard to ensure survival. Sometimes working hard isnt always smart. A playful approach can be just as important.

programme.title: Extraordinary Animals
programme.desc: Sinister: Australia has a reputation for the most sinister animals on earth. Behind each sinister trait lies a clever means of survival.

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Rise of Animals: Triumph of the Vertebrates
programme.sub-title: From the Seas to the Skies
programme.desc: David Attenborough uses fossil evidence and CGI to reveal the story of the vertebrates, from their humble origins as the primitive fish that once swam in ancient seas, to their radical move onto land and beyond.

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Rise of Animals: Triumph of the Vertebrates
programme.desc: David Attenborough uses fossil evidence and CGI to reveal how mammals developed from tiny forest dwellers to become the dominant life form on the planet.

programme.title: Kui Buri: Thailands Hidden Eden
programme.desc: Visit a jungle paradise that is a model for national parks around the world.

programme.title: In for the Kill
programme.desc: Natural predators use camouflaged markings and hidden tunnels to pull off feats of speed, cunning and agility in their hunts.

programme.title: My Best Friends An Animal

programme.title: Surviving the Amazon
programme.desc: A jaguar stalks the river, a snake makes a killer move and a stealth tarantula waits to strike. Nothing is safe when the Amazons predators are on the prowl.

programme.title: Surviving the Amazon
programme.desc: Meet monkeys who like monogamy, a bird who rivals Casanova and a spider wholl risk his life for love. A look at how hard it is to find the one in the jungle.

programme.title: Planet Weird

programme.desc: Patrick Aryee gets eye to eye with Komodo dragons, orangutans and giant pandas as he explores why these creatures all came to be supersized.

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: Jeremy comes to the rescue of three squirrel monkeys while Sonnys capuchin group test out their revamped enclosure.

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: Health checks on the new three rescued squirrel monkeys cause concern. Baby orangutan Mimi takes her next step to becoming a full member of the nursery group.

programme.title: Africas Wild Horizons
programme.desc: Despite its small size, Swaziland boasts big five status and some 132 species of mammals have been recorded there. Giraffe, hippo, zebra, and a variety of antelope can be found across the country, as can predators such as jackals and hyenas.

programme.title: Orangutan Jungle School
programme.desc: Introducing some of the big characters including `class clown Valentino and `Big Boy Beni. There is also an emergency arrival with teenage mum Clara and her baby Clarita and vets round up the older orangutans, who are now ready to be released.

programme.title: Coral City
programme.desc: Adapt or perish in the coral streets as higher-than-normal temperatures make autumn cooling (and survival) more difficult. Shack up with a clownfish family and their sea anemone landlord, then see cleaner fish give manta rays a day at the spa.

programme.title: Malawi Wildlife Rescue
programme.desc: Amanda races to save an elephant calf tangled in a poachers wire snare, while back at the rescue centre, Alma tries to get the newest -- and cutest - arrival, a baby baboon nicknamed Doodle Bob, to bond with a foster baboon mother.

programme.desc: Dr Turner prepares for change with the introduction of the contraceptive pill, while Patsy struggles to help a Bargee woman who is determined to give birth among her own community. As a huge storm threatens Poplar, Nurse Crane helps save the life of a young mother while the aftermath brings with it a welcome return for one Nonnatus House resident.

programme.title: A Small Light
programme.desc: Jan refuses to abandon a dangerous mission, and Miep fears for his life.

programme.title: Copper
programme.desc: As more corpses of young men are found and others continue to disappear, Corcoran leaves no stone unturned in his search for answers. General Brendan Donovan employs unseemly tactics to keep the murders out of the press.

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: Sharon discovers that she is not eligible to vote in Chigwell so she buys Darryls vote off him and Tracey is not certain who to vote for so she gets all the candidates to visit her.

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: Crime fighting takes a back seat as Quinnan and Garfield clash.

programme.title: Classic Doctors
programme.desc: Michelle helps a patient with rheumatoid arthritis who suspects her partner may be cheating on her and Joe confronts Daniel over his suspicious behaviour.

programme.title: Classic Doctors

programme.desc: Eds father collapses while working in the hospital canteen and Ric moves out of Jess and Lisas flat. Mubbs struggles to adjust to Rosie and her children living with him.

programme.title: Classic EastEnders
programme.desc: As Roxy plans her fathers funeral, she discovers shocking news; will she ever be able to forgive Peggy? Janine has trouble at the police station, and Syed returns.

programme.title: All Creatures Great and Small
programme.desc: England is at war and the time has come for James and Siegfried to join their military units. Their last day at the practice is a busy one and James is repeatedly called out when he had hopes to spend a last, quiet evening at home with Helen.

programme.title: Howards Way
programme.desc: Amandas father confronts Leo, Charles waits anxiously for Avril to recover, and Ken basks smugly in the glory of having avoided suspicion for the theft of Jans designs.

programme.desc: Truly deduces that Barry must be up to something sinister, because why else would he be found in the woods with a suitcase?

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.desc: Clegg, Truly and Alvin take some old-timers out for a day, and Barry considers making a charity appearance in western gear.

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine

programme.desc: When Smiler finds himself being pursued by a woman who believes he is rich,and Truly comes up with a few radical solutions to shake her off.

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: A five part series about natures anomalies and how these curious animals continue to surprise us.

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: Sir David Attenborough shines the light on the rhino and hedgehog, both of which have developed thick skin to protect them.

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: Sir David Attenborough shines the spotlight on natures most amazing animals including a look at cuckoos and the way the deaths-head hawkmoth steals honey.

programme.title: The Lakes with Paul Rose
programme.desc: Explorer Paul Rose packs his waterproofs and heads for Derwentwater and Borrowdale. Borrowdale is officially the wettest place in England, and he meets those who have battled against flooding and have learned to live with extreme weather events. Along the way, he tells the story of Millican Dalton, the Professor of Adventure, who ran his own expeditions in the Lake District more than 70 years ago. Paul also heads for the summit of Great Gable, one of the Lakes best known peaks.

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: A five part series about natures anomalies and how these curious animals continue to surprise us.

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: Sir David Attenborough shines the light on the rhino and hedgehog, both of which have developed thick skin to protect them.

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: Sir David Attenborough shines the spotlight on natures most amazing animals including a look at cuckoos and the way the deaths-head hawkmoth steals honey.

programme.title: The Lakes with Paul Rose
programme.desc: Paul Rose has as adrenaline overdose on his way to Coniston, beginning with entering a retro cycling event on a penny farthing before joining the mountain bikers of Grizedale Forest. Paul also relives the final moments of Donald Campbell in his attempt to break the world water speed record on Coniston Water, and ends his trek with a spot of rock climbing at Dow Crag before the ascent of one of the areas best known hills: The Old Man of Coniston.

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: A five part series about natures anomalies and how these curious animals continue to surprise us.

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: Sir David Attenborough shines the light on the rhino and hedgehog, both of which have developed thick skin to protect them.

programme.title: The Lakes with Paul Rose
programme.desc: Remote Eskdale is the final destination in explorer Paul Roses trek through the Lake District. This corner of the western Lakes is off the normal tourist track but it boasts Englands highest mountain. Before heading for the tough Lakeland summit of Scafell Pike, Paul meets the folk who run one of the countrys most scenic railways, he has a close encounter with a vulture, and gets to grips with the locals in a spot of Cumberland wrestling.

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses...
programme.desc: Del decides to resolve a cash-flow crisis by charging people to attend seances conducted by Uncle Alberts psychic girlfriend. However, the enterprise somehow ends in hospital.

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses...

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses...

programme.desc: David is equipped with a hosepipe as he tests out whether the shelters hes asked the comedians to build are waterproof or not, and he also challenges them to design a camp gadget.

programme.title: The Supervet

programme.title: Great American Railroad Journeys
programme.desc: Clutching his 1899 copy of Appletons Guide to Canada, Michael Portillo travels on the Ocean train from Nova Scotia to New Brunswick. Along the way he investigates the worlds biggest tide at Hopewell Rocks and admires its dramatic rock formations and caves. He apparently defies gravity on a magnetic hill in a 1965 Pontiac Bonneville. North of Moncton in Miramichi, he joins the Elipogtog First Nation in a pow wow, where he learns about quilting and traditional dress.

programme.title: Great American Railroad Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo explores America by rail following Appletons General Guide to the US of 1879 which is published at a key moment in American history - the turning point from `new world to the richest nation ever known.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Robbies narrowboat gets a makeover before he explores the River Thames, he moors in Abingdon and tackles an emergency DIY repair to fix a leak.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries

programme.title: Motorhoming With Merton and Webster
programme.desc: Suki and Paul are in Gods Own Country. They stay at the famous Tan Hill Inn, attend a sheep dog training session, and visit the incredible Ribblehead Viaduct.

programme.title: Motorhoming With Merton and Webster
programme.desc: After pitching up at Waless biggest natural lake, the duo try paddle boarding and synchronised swimming. And at campsite Bryn Y Gwin, the pair meet an artist.

programme.title: Frozen Planet
programme.sub-title: To the Ends of the Earth
programme.desc: David Attenborough travels to the ends of the earth on an extraordinary journey across the polar regions of our planet. The Arctic and Antarctic are the greatest and least known wildernesses of all - magical ice worlds inhabited by the most bizarre and hardy creatures on earth. At the North Pole, the sun returns after six months of darkness. A pair of courting polar bears reveal a surprisingly tender side.

programme.title: Frozen Planet
programme.desc: After months of darkness the sun returns. The landscape is dynamically transformed and millions of migrants join the hardy residents as they find mates and begin to breed.

programme.title: Frozen Planet
programme.desc: It is high summer in the polar regions, and the sun never sets. Vast hordes of summer visitors cram a lifetime of drama into one long, magical day; they must feed, fight and rear their young in this brief window of plenty. Summer is a tough time for the polar bear family, as their ice world melts away and the cubs take their first swimming lesson.

programme.title: Frozen Planet
programme.desc: Polar landscapes in autumn are transformed as the big freeze returns. Most animals leave on epic journeys, some now battle to breed, and for the hardy few its a time of opportunity. In the Arctic, polar bears gather in large numbers on the coast to wait for the return of the ice. Tempers soon fray and violent contests break out. Off the coast 2,000 beluga whales head for a special estuary, a gigantic `whale spa.

programme.title: Frozen Planet
programme.desc: Winter is the greatest test for life in the polar regions, as temperatures plummet to 70 below and winds reach 200kph. Only a few remarkable survivors gamble on remaining in these extreme conditions. In the Arctic, a female polar bear treks into the mountains to give birth. Out on the frozen ocean, the entire population of the worlds spectacled eider ducks braves the winter in a giant ice hole.

programme.title: Frozen Planet
programme.desc: Revealing the extraordinary riches and wonders of the polar regions that have kept people visiting them for thousands of years. Today, their survival relies on a combination of ancient wisdom and cutting-edge science. Most Arctic people live in Siberia, either in cities like Norilsk - the coldest city on earth - or out on the tundra, where tribes like the Dogan survive by herding reindeer.

programme.title: Frozen Planet

programme.desc: Derek collects a pair of stylish British classics from a Yorkshire workshop, with the Morris 1000 finding a new home with a 10-year-old superfan.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Daves son Jack is heading out to Cheshire to collect two cars with a 35-year age difference. And luckily for Mathewsons, Lucy knows exactly what has been brought in for auction.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: A 1970 Excalibur Roadstar, once owned by Roy Orbison, arrives at Thornton le Dale and Derek heads to County Durham to collect a 1935 Austin 7 Ulster thats been completely rebuilt.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Two iconic British classics find their way to the Mathewsons auction room; Dave heads to North Manchester to pick up an Austin A30 and a Morris 8 E thats had an alternative paint job.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Derek swaps the chaos of the office for rain-soaked Ripon to collect a 1965 Ford Anglia with just 33,000 miles on the clock. Meanwhile, Dave enjoys the clean lines of a rare Renault Caravalle.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Paul sets out for County Durham in order to collect both a 1936 Singer Le Mans sports car and a pristine 1957 Lambretta LD 150. In the meantime, Derek gets his hands on a 1962 MGA MK2 Coupe.

programme.title: War Factories
programme.desc: The remarkable story of how Stalins massive war factories were dismantled and moved east on one and half million railway trucks, to avoid being lost to the Nazis.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona and the team head to Leicesters Museum of Technology, housed in a Victorian sewage pumping station: the Abbey Pumping Station, complete with four working beam engines. Mark Hill casts his expert eye over an abandoned sculpture which looks strangely familiar, Richard Price values a clock powered by gravity and John Axford explains how a tiny frog can have a big price tag.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team are in Belfast at the magnificent Parliament Buildings in Stormont Estate. An unloved muffin dish holds a surprise, Justin Croft spots an unread copy of Ulysses and John Foster delves into Belfasts 18th-century water system.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Derek meets the owner and builder of a sporty vintage Jaguar special, a Jaguar Viking.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: The team goes behind the scenes at Mathewsons, a North Yorkshire-based, family-run car auction business which uncovers rare vehicles in Thornton-le-Dale. It attracts classic car buyers from all over the country.

programme.title: War Factories

programme.title: Turkey with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: In the Taurus Mountains Simon stays with descendants of the original Turks, nomads known as Yoruks, whose lifestyle is under threat from the amodern world and an increasingly Islamic government.

programme.title: Wilderness with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon Reeve travels across the Kalahari in Southern Africa. Along the way, Simon tracks wildebeest with a group of one of the regions indigenous inhabitants, the San, who are renowned for their hunting and tracking techniques.

programme.title: Indian Ocean with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon Reeves journey around the spectacular Indian Ocean takes him from Oman to the Maldives. He starts in the remote and otherworldly Musandam peninsula on the Strait of Hormuz, one of the most strategically important waterways in the world, where oil from the Persian Gulf is shipped through the narrow channel out into the Indian Ocean. The journey takes him on to Mumbai, the Indian Oceans biggest port.

Only a few remarkable survivors gamble on remaining in these extreme conditions. In the Arctic, a female polar bear treks into the mountains to give birth. Out on the frozen ocean, the entire population of the worlds spectacled eider ducks braves the winter in a giant ice hole.

programme.title: Frozen Planet
programme.desc: Revealing the extraordinary riches and wonders of the polar regions that have kept people visiting them for thousands of years. Today, their survival relies on a combination of ancient wisdom and cutting-edge science. Most Arctic people live in Siberia, either in cities like Norilsk - the coldest city on earth - or out on the tundra, where tribes like the Dogan survive by herding reindeer.

programme.title: Frozen Planet
programme.sub-title: To the Ends of the Earth
programme.desc: David Attenborough travels to the ends of the earth on an extraordinary journey across the polar regions of our planet. The Arctic and Antarctic are the greatest and least known wildernesses of all - magical ice worlds inhabited by the most bizarre and hardy creatures on earth. At the North Pole, the sun returns after six months of darkness. A pair of courting polar bears reveal a surprisingly tender side.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Robbies narrowboat gets a makeover before he explores the River Thames, he moors in Abingdon and tackles an emergency DIY repair to fix a leak.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Robbie visits a former Beatles home in Henley, uncovers horror history in Marlow and struggles to find a mooring in Maidenhead on the River Thames.

programme.title: Classic Car Kings
programme.desc: Irv imports an original-run short wheelbase Porsche 911 from the east coast of America. He needs to make it roadworthy, while keeping its incredible sun-faded patina.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.sub-title: MG Magnette; Morris Minor; De Tomaso Lomngchamp; Ford Escort Rally Car
programme.desc: Derek collects a pair of stylish British classics from a Yorkshire workshop, with the Morris 1000 finding a new home with a 10-year-old superfan.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Daves son Jack is heading out to Cheshire to collect two cars with a 35-year age difference. And luckily for Mathewsons, Lucy knows exactly what has been brought in for auction.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: A 1970 Excalibur Roadstar, once owned by Roy Orbison, arrives at Thornton le Dale and Derek heads to County Durham to collect a 1935 Austin 7 Ulster thats been completely rebuilt.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Two iconic British classics find their way to the Mathewsons auction room; Dave heads to North Manchester to pick up an Austin A30 and a Morris 8 E thats had an alternative paint job.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: New. An impressive collection of five iconic cars arrives at Thornton le Dale, including a 1967 Crayford Corsair and a 1966 Ford Zodiac which emerge from a garage in Selby.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Derek swaps the chaos of the office for rain-soaked Ripon to collect a 1965 Ford Anglia with just 33,000 miles on the clock. Meanwhile, Dave enjoys the clean lines of a rare Renault Caravalle.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Paul sets out for County Durham in order to collect both a 1936 Singer Le Mans sports car and a pristine 1957 Lambretta LD 150. In the meantime, Derek gets his hands on a 1962 MGA MK2 Coupe.

programme.title: War Factories
programme.desc: The remarkable story of how Stalins massive war factories were dismantled and moved east on one and half million railway trucks, to avoid being lost to the Nazis.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona and the team head to Leicesters Museum of Technology, housed in a Victorian sewage pumping station: the Abbey Pumping Station, complete with four working beam engines. Mark Hill casts his expert eye over an abandoned sculpture which looks strangely familiar, Richard Price values a clock powered by gravity and John Axford explains how a tiny frog can have a big price tag.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team are in Belfast at the magnificent Parliament Buildings in Stormont Estate. An unloved muffin dish holds a surprise, Justin Croft spots an unread copy of Ulysses and John Foster delves into Belfasts 18th-century water system.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Derek meets the owner and builder of a sporty vintage Jaguar special, a Jaguar Viking.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: The team goes behind the scenes at Mathewsons, a North Yorkshire-based, family-run car auction business which uncovers rare vehicles in Thornton-le-Dale. It attracts classic car buyers from all over the country.

programme.title: Turkey with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: In the Taurus Mountains Simon stays with descendants of the original Turks, nomads known as Yoruks, whose lifestyle is under threat from the amodern world and an increasingly Islamic government.

programme.title: Wilderness with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon Reeve travels across the Kalahari in Southern Africa. Along the way, Simon tracks wildebeest with a group of one of the regions indigenous inhabitants, the San, who are renowned for their hunting and tracking techniques.

programme.title: Indian Ocean with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon Reeves journey around the spectacular Indian Ocean takes him from Oman to the Maldives. He starts in the remote and otherworldly Musandam peninsula on the Strait of Hormuz, one of the most strategically important waterways in the world, where oil from the Persian Gulf is shipped through the narrow channel out into the Indian Ocean. The journey takes him on to Mumbai, the Indian Oceans biggest port.
